compiled_state.title: GREEN: Implement overlay dispatch logic in review workflow
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Implement the defense-in-depth dispatch: parallel overlay when classifier emits deterministic signal, serial overlay when tier reviewer raises flag, no overlay when neither fires.

### Implementation
1. After classifier runs (Step 3 in REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md), parse security_overlay and performance_overlay flags from classifier JSON
2. If deterministic signal fires: dispatch corresponding overlay agent(s) in parallel with tier reviewer
3. After tier review completes: parse summary for security_overlay_warranted and performance_overlay_warranted
4. If tier flag fires (without deterministic): dispatch overlay serially
5. If neither fires: skip overlay
6. Collect overlay findings for resolution loop integration (w22-agl5)
7. Graceful degradation: overlay agent timeout/failure does not block commit

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md (dispatch logic)
- Create helper script if needed for dispatch orchestration

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-overlay-dispatch.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAILED: 0"
- [ ] REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md contains overlay dispatch section
  Verify: grep -q "overlay.*dispatch\|Overlay.*Dispatch" plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md
- [ ] Graceful degradation documented
  Verify: grep -q "graceful\|does not block" plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md
